title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MANAMBONG COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYAMBANG, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO ASUNCION P. GUEVARA COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 894 / 55 OG No. 24, 4412 (June 15, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2173, April 26, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MANAMBONG COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYAMBANG, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO ASUNCION P. GUEVARA COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Manambong Community School in the Municipality of Bayambang, Province of Pangasinan, is hereby changed to Asuncion P. Guevara Community School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 26, 1959.
